scripts.reset: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ports = 8081,8082,8083; $listenerPids = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $ports -contains $_.LocalPort } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($listenerId in $listenerPids) { try { Stop-Process -Id $listenerId -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; $ip = (ipconfig | Select-String 'IPv4 Address|Endere.o IPv4' | ForEach-Object { if ($_ -match '(\d{1,3}(?:\.\d{1,3}){3})') { $matches[1] } } | Where-Object { $_ -and $_ -notlike '127.*' -and $_ -notlike '169.254.*' } | Select-Object -First 1); $env:REACT_NATIVE_PACKAGER_HOSTNAME = $ip; npx expo start --lan --port 8081 -c"
scripts.lan:fixed: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ip = (ipconfig | Select-String 'IPv4 Address|Endere.o IPv4' | ForEach-Object { if ($_ -match '(\d{1,3}(?:\.\d{1,3}){3})') { $matches[1] } } | Where-Object { $_ -and $_ -notlike '127.*' -and $_ -notlike '169.254.*' } | Select-Object -First 1); $env:REACT_NATIVE_PACKAGER_HOSTNAME = $ip; npx expo start --lan"
scripts.lan:fixed:clear: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ip = (ipconfig | Select-String 'IPv4 Address|Endere.o IPv4' | ForEach-Object { if ($_ -match '(\d{1,3}(?:\.\d{1,3}){3})') { $matches[1] } } | Where-Object { $_ -and $_ -notlike '127.*' -and $_ -notlike '169.254.*' } | Select-Object -First 1); $env:REACT_NATIVE_PACKAGER_HOSTNAME = $ip; npx expo start --lan -c"
